entity-table.description: Data table with columns and sorting

fields.description: Fields to display - accepts string[] or Column[] for unified interface. Alias for columns

columns.description: Columns can be Column objects or simple string field names - accepts readonly for generated const arrays

data.description: Data array - primary prop for data. Accepts readonly or mutable arrays, and unknown for generated components

entity.description: Entity name for auto-fetch OR data array (backwards compatible)

itemActions.description: Item actions from generated code - maps to rowActions

defaultPageSize.description: Items per page for automatic pagination (default: 20)

query.description: Query singleton binding for filter/sort state. When provided, syncs with the query singleton for filtering and sorting. Example: "@TaskQuery"

entity.description: Entity name for auto-fetch OR data array (backwards compatible)

data.description: Data array - primary prop for data

fields.description: Fields to display - accepts string[] or {key, header}[] for unified interface

query.description: Query singleton binding for filter/sort state. When provided, syncs with the query singleton for filtering and sorting. Example: "@TaskQuery"

entity-cards.description: Grid of cards for visual content

alignItems.description: Align cards vertically in their cells

children.description: Children elements (cards) - optional when using entity/data props

fields.description: Fields to display - accepts string[] or {key, header}[] for unified interface

data.description: Data array for data-bound usage - accepts readonly for generated const arrays

onCardClick.description: Callback when a card is clicked

query.description: Query singleton binding for filter/sort state. When provided, syncs with the query singleton for filtering and sorting. Example: "@TaskQuery"

entity-detail.description: Single entity view with all fields

actions.description: Unified actions array - first action with variant='primary' is the main action

fieldNames.description: Field names - accepts readonly for generated const arrays

fields.description: Explicit field definitions - accepts readonly for generated const arrays

actions.description: Unified actions array - first action with variant='primary' is the main action

fields.description: Fields to display - accepts string[] or {key, header}[] for unified interface

page-header.description: Page title with optional breadcrumb and action buttons

title.description: Page title - accepts unknown to handle generated code accessing dynamic entity data

backEvent.description: Event to emit when back is clicked (default: BACK)

actions.description: Actions array - first action with variant='primary' (or first action) is the main action

form.description: Complete form with fields and actions

onSubmit.description: Submit handler - receives form data, or event name string for trait dispatch

onCancel.description: Cancel handler - function or event name string for trait dispatch

mode.description: Form mode - 'create' for new records, 'edit' for updating existing

fields.description: Fields definition (schema format) - accepts readonly for generated const arrays

cancelLabel.description: Cancel button label (if provided, shows cancel button)

showCancel.description: Show cancel button (defaults to true for schema forms)

title.description: Form title (used by ModalSlot to extract title)

submitEvent.description: Event dispatch props (for trait state machine integration)

cancelEvent.description: Event to dispatch on cancel (defaults to 'CANCEL')

relationsLoading.description: Loading state for relation data: { fieldName: boolean }

hiddenCalculations.description: Hidden calculations that emit GLOBAL_VARIABLE_SET on field change (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

violationTriggers.description: Violation conditions that emit VIOLATION_DETECTED when met (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

evaluationContext.description: Context for S-expression evaluation - accepts flexible types from generated code

sections.description: Nested form sections with optional conditions

onFieldChange.description: Callback when any field value changes

repeatable.description: Whether the form supports repeatable entries

event.description: Event name to dispatch on search (schema metadata, wired by trait) This is metadata used by the trait generator, not by the component.

entity.description: Entity type for context-aware search. When provided, search events include entity context.

query.description: Query singleton binding for state management. When provided, syncs search state with the query singleton. Example: "@TaskQuery"

event.description: Event name to dispatch on search (schema metadata, wired by trait) This is metadata used by the trait generator, not by the component.

entity.description: Entity type for context-aware search. When provided, search events include entity context.

query.description: Query singleton binding for state management. When provided, syncs search state with the query singleton. Example: "@TaskQuery"

onFilterChange.description: Callback when a filter changes - for EntityStore integration

query.description: Query singleton binding for state management. When provided, syncs filter state with the query singleton. Example: "@TaskQuery"

tabs.description: Tab items (alias for items - used by generated code)

maxItems.description: Maximum items to show (truncates with ellipsis)

onStepClick.description: Callback when a completed step is clicked

allowNavigation.description: Allow clicking on completed steps to navigate back

isValid.description: Whether the current step is valid (enables Next/Complete)

showComplete.description: Show the Complete button (on last step)

onBack.description: Event to emit on Back click

onNext.description: Event to emit on Next click

onComplete.description: Event to emit on Complete click

onBackClick.description: Direct callback for Back (alternative to event)

onNextClick.description: Direct callback for Next (alternative to event)

onCompleteClick.description: Direct callback for Complete (alternative to event)

currentStep.description: Current step index (controlled) - accepts unknown for generated code compatibility

onPageChange.description: Callback when page changes (optional - can be a no-op if not interactive)

showJumpToPage.description: Show jump to page input @default false

maxVisiblePages.description: Maximum number of page buttons to show @default 7

icon.description: Icon to display. Accepts either: - A Lucide icon component (LucideIcon) - A string icon name (e.g., "check-circle", "x-circle")

title.description: Primary text to display - use title or message (message is alias for backwards compat)

message.description: Alias for title - used by schema patterns

duration.description: Auto-dismiss duration in milliseconds (0 = no auto-dismiss)

value.description: Primary value - accepts array/unknown from generated code (will use first element or length)

currentValue.description: Current value as number for trend calculation

invertTrend.description: Whether up is good (green) or bad (red)

metrics.description: Metrics to display (schema format) - accepts readonly for compatibility with generated const arrays

data.description: Data to calculate stats from - accepts readonly for compatibility with generated const arrays

dashboard-grid.description: Multi-column grid for widgets and stats cards

isOpen.description: Whether the modal is open (defaults to true when rendered by slot wrapper)

onClose.description: Callback when modal should close (injected by slot wrapper)

title.description: Override modal title (extracted from children if not provided)

isOpen.description: Whether the drawer is open (defaults to true when rendered by slot wrapper)

onClose.description: Callback when drawer should close (injected by slot wrapper)

children.description: Drawer content (can be empty if using slot content)

title.description: Override drawer title (extracted from children if not provided)

isOpen.description: Whether the dialog is open (defaults to true when rendered by slot wrapper)

onClose.description: Callback when dialog is closed (injected by slot wrapper)

onConfirm.description: Callback when action is confirmed (injected by slot wrapper)

ratio.description: Initial ratio (0-100, percentage of first pane)

minSize.description: Minimum size of either pane in pixels

master-detail.description: List on left, selected item detail on right

emptyDetail.description: Content shown when nothing is selected

hasSelection.description: Whether an item is currently selected

tabbed-layout.description: Tabbed content areas with shared header/context

vstack.description: Vertical flex container for stacking children

hstack.description: Horizontal flex container for inline children

box.description: Generic styled container with padding, borders, and backgrounds

grid.description: CSS Grid layout for multi-column content

cols.description: Number of columns (can be responsive object)

inline.description: Center inline (width fits content) vs block (full width)

spacer.description: Flexible space that expands to fill available room

label.description: Text label to display in the divider

renderEntities.description: Entity type names to render (optional filter)

renderer.description: Renderer type hint from schema (e.g., 'phaser', 'canvas'). Currently ignored - component uses Canvas2D. Reserved for future multi-renderer support.

width.description: Canvas width in pixels or 'full' for responsive

height.description: Canvas height in pixels or 'auto' for aspect ratio

debug.description: Debug mode shows hitboxes and entity info

enableInput.description: Enable keyboard input handling (updates Input entity)

eventBus.description: Event bus for emitting collision events

agent-chat-panel.description: Chat panel for AI agent interactions

conditional-wrapper.description: ConditionalWrapper Atom Component  A wrapper component that conditionally renders its children based on S-expression evaluation. Used for dynamic field visibility in inspection forms.

children.description: Children to render when condition is true (or when no condition is provided)

fallback.description: Optional fallback to render when condition is false

animate.description: Whether to animate the transition (uses CSS transitions)

law-reference-tooltip.description: LawReferenceTooltip Atom Component  A specialized tooltip for displaying law references in inspection forms. Shows law name, article number, and relevant clause text.

children.description: Children element that triggers the tooltip

overlay.description: Overlay Atom Component  A fixed backdrop for modals and drawers.

stack.description: Stack Component  A layout primitive for arranging children in a vertical or horizontal stack with consistent spacing. Includes convenience exports VStack and HStack for common use cases.

align.description: Align items on the cross axis

justify.description: Justify items on the main axis

text-highlight.description: TextHighlight Atom Component  A styled span component for highlighting text with annotations (questions or notes). Uses different colors for different annotation types: - Questions: Blue highlight - Notes: Yellow highlight

isActive.description: Whether the highlight is currently active/focused @default false

theme-toggle.description: ThemeToggle Atom Component  A button that toggles between light and dark themes. Uses Sun and Moon icons to indicate current/target theme.

typography.description: Typography Atom Component  Text elements following the KFlow design system with theme-aware styling.

level.description: Heading level (1-6) - alternative to variant for headings

pressed.description: Whether the button is currently pressed

sprite.description: Sprite Component  Renders a single frame from a spritesheet with transform support.

frameWidth.description: Width of each frame in pixels

frameHeight.description: Height of each frame in pixels

frame.description: Frame index to display (0-based, left-to-right, top-to-bottom)

columns.description: Number of columns in spritesheet (for frame calculation)

form-actions.description: ButtonGroup Molecule Component  A component for grouping buttons together with connected styling. Supports both children-based and form-actions pattern (primary/secondary) usage. Uses Button atoms.

children.description: Button group content (Button components) - use this OR primary/secondary

primary.description: Primary action button config (for form-actions pattern) Accepts Readonly for compatibility with generated const objects

secondary.description: Secondary action buttons config (for form-actions pattern) Accepts readonly array for compatibility with generated const arrays

entity.description: Entity type for filter-group pattern (schema metadata)

flex.description: Flex Component  A flexbox wrapper with all common flex properties exposed as props. More explicit than Stack for when you need full flex control.

floating-action-button.description: FloatingActionButton Molecule Component  A floating action button that can expand into multiple actions vertically. Uses Button atom.

action.description: Single action (if only one action, button will directly trigger onClick)

actions.description: Multiple actions (if provided, button will expand to show all actions)

icon.description: Icon name (simplified API for pattern compatibility)

onClick.description: Click handler (simplified API for pattern compatibility)

form-field.description: FormField Molecule Component  A form field wrapper with label, hint, and error message support. **Atomic Design**: Composed using Label and Typography atoms.

form-section-header.description: FormSectionHeader  Header component for collapsible form sections. Provides consistent styling and interaction for section headers.

icon.description: Icon name to show before title

input-group.description: InputGroup Molecule Component  A component for grouping input with addons (icons, buttons, text). Uses Input, Button, Icon, and Typography atoms.

relation-select.description: RelationSelect Molecule Component  A searchable select component for relation fields. Allows users to search and select from related entities.  Composed from: Box, HStack, VStack, Input, Button, Spinner, Typography atoms

options.description: Available options - accepts readonly for compatibility with generated const arrays

side-panel.description: SidePanel Molecule Component  A side panel that slides in from the right (or left) with header and content. Uses Button, Typography atoms.

violation-alert.description: ViolationAlert  Displays inspection violations with law references and action types. Used in inspection forms to show detected compliance violations.  Action Types: - measure: Corrective measure required (warning) - admin: Administrative action (error) - penalty: Penalty proceedings (error, severe)

severity.description: Visual severity (derived from actionType if not specified)

onNavigateToField.description: Navigate to the field that caused violation

onAction.description: Called when a button is pressed/released

onDirection.description: Called when a direction is pressed/released

value.description: Current value (defaults to 0 if not provided)

source.description: Data source entity name (for schema config)

field.description: Field name in the source (for schema config)

button-pattern.description: Component Pattern Wrappers  Pattern wrappers for atomic UI components that can be rendered via render_ui. These bridge the shell's atomic components with the pattern system.  Interactive components emit events via useEventBus for the closed circuit pattern.

custom-pattern.description: CustomPattern Component  Renders freeform HTML elements with Tailwind classes for custom UI designs. Supports nested children and the closed circuit pattern (action prop for events).

token.description: Token path(s) for design token resolution

action.description: Event to emit on click (REQUIRED for interactive elements)

drawer-slot.description: DrawerSlot Component  Wraps drawer slot content in a proper Drawer component. Used by trait-driven pages to display drawer UI from render_ui effects.  Handles: - Auto-open when content is present - Dispatches CLOSE/CANCEL events when closed - Extracts title from Form or DetailPanel components - Configurable position and size

children.description: Content to display in the drawer

title.description: Override drawer title (extracted from children if not provided)

header.description: Header Organism Component  A header component for mobile/responsive layouts with menu toggle, brand, and user avatar. Styled to match the main Layout component's mobile header.

onUserClick.description: Callback when user avatar is clicked

variant.description: Variant - mobile shows menu toggle, desktop shows full nav @default 'mobile'

layout-pattern.description: Base props for all layout patterns with children support.

modal-slot.description: ModalSlot Component  Wraps modal slot content in a proper Modal component. Used by trait-driven pages to display modal UI from render_ui effects.  Handles: - Auto-open when content is present - Dispatches CLOSE/CANCEL events when closed - Extracts title from Form components

children.description: Content to display in the modal

title.description: Override modal title (extracted from children if not provided)

navigation.description: Navigation Organism Component  A navigation component with items, active indicators, icons, and badges. Uses Menu, ButtonGroup molecules and Button, Icon, Badge, Typography, Divider atoms.

orbital-visualization.description: OrbitalVisualization Component  Visualizes KFlow schemas as atomic orbitals based on complexity. Uses CSS 3D transforms for lightweight rendering without Three.js.  Orbital Types (based on complexity score): - 1s (1-3): Simple sphere - Red - 2s (4-8): Larger sphere - Orange - 2p (9-15): Dumbbell shape - Yellow - 3s (16-25): Sphere with node - Green - 3p (26-40): Complex dumbbell - Blue - 3d (41-60): Cloverleaf - Indigo - 4f (61+): Multi-lobe - Violet

section.description: Section Component  A semantic section wrapper with optional title, description, and action. Perfect for grouping related content with consistent spacing.

sidebar.description: Sidebar Organism Component  A sidebar component with logo, navigation items, user section, and collapse/expand. Styled to match the main Layout component with theme-aware CSS variables.

logo.description: Logo/Brand content - can be a ReactNode or logo config

onClose.description: Callback when close button is clicked

split.description: Split Component  A two-column layout with configurable ratios. Perfect for sidebar/content layouts or side-by-side comparisons.

ratio.description: Size ratio between left and right panels

stackBreakpoint.description: Breakpoint to switch from stacked to side-by-side

table.description: Table Organism Component  A table component with header row, data rows, pagination, sorting, and filters. Uses Pagination, SearchInput, ButtonGroup, Card, Menu molecules and Button, Icon, Checkbox, Typography, Badge, Divider atoms.

toast-slot.description: ToastSlot Component  Wraps toast slot content in a proper Toast component with positioning. Used by trait-driven pages to display toast UI from render_ui effects.  Handles: - Auto-show when content is present - Dispatches DISMISS event when dismissed - Fixed positioning in corner of screen

children.description: Content to display in the toast (message or ReactNode)

duration.description: Auto-dismiss duration in ms (0 = no auto-dismiss)

u-i-slot-renderer.description: UISlotRenderer Component  Renders all UI slots. This is the central component that displays content rendered by traits via render_ui effects.  Slots are rendered as: - Layout slots: Inline in the page flow (main, sidebar) - Portal slots: Rendered via portals (modal, drawer, toast, etc.) - HUD slots: Fixed position overlays (hud-top, hud-bottom)

className.description: Additional class name for the container

split-pane.description: SplitPane Component  Two-pane resizable split layout for master-detail views, dual-pane editors, and code + preview layouts.  Uses wireframe theme styling (high contrast, sharp edges).

ratio.description: Initial ratio (0-100, percentage of first pane)

minSize.description: Minimum size of either pane in pixels

tabbed-container.description: TabbedContainer Component  Tabbed content areas with shared header/context. Wraps the Tabs molecule with layout-specific styling.  Uses wireframe theme styling (high contrast, sharp edges).

showBranding.description: Show branding panel on the side

counter-template.description: CounterTemplate  A presentational template for counter/incrementer features. Supports increment, decrement, and reset operations.

crud-template.description: CrudTemplate  A presentational template for CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) features. Includes data table, search, and modal forms for create/edit.

isModalOpen.description: Whether the create/edit modal is open

onCreate.description: Called when creating a new item

onSelect.description: Called when selecting an item for editing

user.description: Current user info (optional - auto-populated from auth context if not provided)

onSignOut.description: Callback when user clicks sign out (optional - uses auth context signOut if not provided)

form-template.description: FormTemplate  A presentational template for form-based features like contact forms, feedback, surveys. Supports submission, validation, and success/error states.

onFieldChange.description: Called when a field value changes

game-template.description: GameTemplate  A presentational template for game applications. Includes a main game canvas/area, HUD overlay, and an optional debug sidebar. **Atomic Design**: Composed using Box, Typography, and Layout molecules/atoms.

children.description: The main game canvas or content

showDebugPanel.description: Whether the debug panel is visible

generic-app-template.description: GenericAppTemplate  A simple, generic template for any application. Includes a header with title and actions, and a main content area. **Atomic Design**: Composed using Box, Typography, and Button atoms.

list-template.description: ListTemplate  A presentational template for list-based features like todos, shopping lists, notes. Supports add, toggle, delete, and filter operations.

onAdd.description: Called when a new item is added

onToggle.description: Called when an item is toggled

onDelete.description: Called when an item is deleted

emptyMessage.description: Message shown when list is empty

settings-template.description: SettingsTemplate  A presentational template for settings/preferences features. Supports sections with various input types and save/reset operations.

onChange.description: Called when a setting value changes

onReset.description: Called to reset to default settings

showResetToDefaults.description: Whether to show reset to defaults button

a-i-analysis-panel.description: AIAnalysisPanel  Display AI-generated analysis and recommendations. AI features for advanced insights.  Maps to aiAnalysis field on MealPlan entity  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:REGENERATE_ANALYSIS - when regenerate button is clicked - Payload: { resourceType, resourceId, entity }

credits-template.description: CreditsTemplate  Template for the Credits management page (/credits). Displays Credit entities with balance tracking and expiration alerts.  Page: CreditsPage Entity: Credit ViewType: list Trait: CreditManagement  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:CREATE - add new credits - Emits: UI:EDIT - edit credit entry - Emits: UI:ADJUST - adjust credit balance - Emits: UI:DELETE - remove credits

fitness-template.description: FitnessTemplate  Template for the Fitness/Lift tracking page (/fitness). Displays Lift entities with exercise tracking and wellness input.  Page: FitnessTrackingPage Entity: Lift ViewType: dashboard Trait: LiftManagement  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:LOG_LIFT - log a new lift - Emits: UI:VIEW - view lift details - Emits: UI:EDIT - edit lift - Emits: UI:DELETE - delete lift

meal-plan-detail-template.description: MealPlanDetailTemplate  Template for viewing detailed information about a meal plan. Shows nutrition breakdown, AI analysis, and sharing options.  Page: MealPlanDetailPage (derived) Entity: MealPlan ViewType: detail  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:EDIT - edit meal plan - Emits: UI:DELETE - delete meal plan - Emits: UI:ANALYZE - request AI analysis - Emits: UI:SHARE - share meal plan - Emits: UI:BACK - navigate back

meal-plans-template.description: MealPlansTemplate  Template for the Meal Plans list page (/meal-plans). Displays MealPlan entities with AI analysis and sharing features.  Page: MealPlansPage Entity: MealPlan ViewType: list Trait: MealPlanManagement  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:CREATE - create new meal plan - Emits: UI:VIEW - view meal plan details - Emits: UI:EDIT - edit meal plan - Emits: UI:DELETE - delete meal plan - Emits: UI:ANALYZE - request AI analysis - Emits: UI:SHARE - share meal plan

progress-template.description: ProgressTemplate  Template for the Progress tracking page (/progress). Displays ProgressEntry entities (kinesiology exams, special exercises, assessments, milestones).  Page: ProgressPage Entity: ProgressEntry ViewType: list Trait: ProgressManagement  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:CREATE_PROGRESS - create new progress entry - Emits: UI:VIEW - view progress entry details - Emits: UI:EDIT - edit progress entry - Emits: UI:DELETE - delete progress entry

schedule-template.description: ScheduleTemplate  Template for the weekly schedule/calendar view of training sessions. Displays sessions in a calendar format with day/week navigation.  Page: SchedulePage (derived from TrainingSessionsPage) Entity: TrainingSession ViewType: calendar  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:CREATE - create new session at time slot - Emits: UI:VIEW - view session details - Emits: UI:DAY_SELECTED - when a day is selected - Emits: UI:WEEK_CHANGE - when week navigation happens

session-detail-template.description: SessionDetailTemplate  Template for viewing detailed information about a training session. Shows session info, participants, exercises, and video link.  Page: SessionDetailPage (derived) Entity: TrainingSession ViewType: detail  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:EDIT - edit session - Emits: UI:START - start session - Emits: UI:COMPLETE - complete session - Emits: UI:CANCEL - cancel session - Emits: UI:DELETE - delete session - Emits: UI:BACK - navigate back

sessions-template.description: SessionsTemplate  Template for the Training Sessions list page (/training-sessions). Displays TrainingSession entities with filtering by status and type.  Page: TrainingSessionsPage Entity: TrainingSession ViewType: list Traits: TrainingSessionManagement, GroupSessionManagement  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:CREATE - create new session - Emits: UI:VIEW - view session details - Emits: UI:EDIT - edit session - Emits: UI:START - start a session - Emits: UI:COMPLETE - complete a session - Emits: UI:CANCEL - cancel a session - Emits: UI:DELETE - delete session

trainee-detail-template.description: TraineeDetailTemplate  Template for viewing detailed information about a trainee. Displays trainee profile with their lifts, wellness, progress, and sessions.  Page: UserDetailPage (not explicitly in schema, derived) Entity: User ViewType: detail  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:EDIT - edit user - Emits: UI:DELETE - delete user - Emits: UI:BACK - navigate back - Emits: UI:VIEW_LIFTS - view trainee's lifts - Emits: UI:VIEW_SESSIONS - view trainee's sessions

trainees-template.description: TraineesTemplate  Template for the Trainees/Users list page (/users). Displays User entities as a card grid with trainer/trainee role filtering.  Page: UsersPage Entity: User ViewType: list Trait: UserManagement  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:CREATE - create new user - Emits: UI:VIEW - view user details - Emits: UI:EDIT - edit user - Emits: UI:DELETE - delete user - Emits: UI:SEARCH - search users - Emits: UI:FILTER - filter by role

agent-avatar.description: AgentAvatar - Avatar indicator for agent/user messages  Shows a small icon representing the message source. Extends base Avatar component with agent-specific roles.  Event Contract: - Emits: None (display only)

agent-status-badge.description: AgentStatusBadge - Displays the current status of the agent  Shows a colored badge with optional pulse animation for active states.  Event Contract: - Emits: None (display only)

diff-line.description: DiffLine - Single line of a diff display  Shows a line with appropriate coloring for add/remove/context.  Event Contract: - Emits: None (display only)

tool-badge.description: ToolBadge - Displays a tool name as a styled badge/pill  Event Contract: - Emits: None (display only)

editable-json-viewer.description: Editable JSON Viewer Component  Allows editing JSON data in a textarea and saving changes.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:JSON_CHANGE - When JSON content is edited - Payload: { value: object }

chat-message.description: ChatMessage - A chat bubble for agent/user messages  Displays message content with avatar and optional timestamp.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:COPY_MESSAGE (optional) - When message is copied - Emits: UI:RETRY_MESSAGE (optional) - When retry is requested - Payload: { message: ChatMessageData }

isStreaming.description: Is the message still being typed/streamed

diff-block.description: DiffBlock - A block of diff lines with file header  Shows a unified diff format for file changes.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:ACCEPT_CHANGE - When a change is accepted - Emits: UI:REJECT_CHANGE - When a change is rejected - Payload: { change: DiffChange }

error-alert.description: ErrorAlert - Displays an error message with optional retry  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:DISMISS_ERROR - When error is dismissed - Emits: UI:RETRY_ACTION - When retry is clicked - Payload: void

file-operation-item.description: FileOperationItem - Displays a file operation indicator  Event Contract: - Emits: None (display only)

todo-item.description: TodoItem - A single todo item with activity accordion  Displays a todo with status indicator and expandable activity details.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:TODO_TOGGLE - When todo status is toggled - Emits: UI:TODO_SELECT - When todo is selected - Payload: { todo: TodoItemData }

tool-call-card.description: ToolCallCard - Displays a tool call with arguments  Shows the tool being called and its arguments in an expandable format.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:EXPAND_TOOL - When tool card is expanded - Emits: UI:RETRY_TOOL - When retry is requested - Payload: { toolCall: ToolCallData }

isExecuting.description: Whether the tool is currently executing

agent-activity-feed.description: AgentActivityFeed - Scrollable activity stream  Displays messages, tool calls, and schema changes in chronological order.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:SELECT_ACTIVITY - When an activity is selected - Emits: UI:CLEAR_ACTIVITY - When activities are cleared - Payload: { activity: ActivityItem }

autoScroll.description: Auto-scroll to bottom on new activities

agent-chat-input.description: AgentChatInput - Chat input with send button  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:SEND_MESSAGE - When message is sent - Payload: { message: string }

isProcessing.description: Whether the agent is currently processing

agent-status-header.description: AgentStatusHeader - Header showing agent status and controls  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:CANCEL_GENERATION - When cancel is clicked - Payload: void

threadId.description: Thread ID for the current session

studio-home-electron-template.description: StudioHomeElectronTemplate - Electron mode home page with file picker and recent files  Entry point for Electron users with file picker and recent files list.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:OPEN_FILE - When opening a file via file picker - Emits: UI:CREATE_NEW - When creating a new project - Emits: UI:OPEN_RECENT - When opening a recent file - Emits: UI:REMOVE_RECENT - When removing a file from recent list - Emits: UI:CLEAR_RECENT - When clearing all recent files - Payload: { file: RecentFile } or void

companies-template.description: CompaniesTemplate  Template for the Companies list page (/companies). Displays Company entities (merchants being inspected).  Page: CompaniesPage Entity: Company ViewType: list

inspection-form-demo-template.description: InspectionFormDemoTemplate  A comprehensive demo template that showcases all 5 inspection phases with config-driven dynamic forms. This template is designed for presenting to the client to demonstrate the complete inspection workflow.  Features: - Loads form configs from config/tabs/*.json - Renders forms with conditional fields - Shows global variable propagation between tabs - Displays violation tracking - Debug panel for HG-* variables

configs.description: Form tab configs keyed by tabId

mockData.description: Mock entity data for dynamic field types (card-selector, entity-list, etc.) Structure matches .orb schema entities. Example: ``` { InspectionField: [ { id: "1", name: "Trgovina", description: "...", fieldType: "merchant", isActive: true, ruleCount: 45 }, { id: "2", name: "Gostinstvo", description: "...", fieldType: "merchant", isActive: true, ruleCount: 32 } ], Company: [ { id: "1", name: "Podjetje d.o.o.", registrationNumber: "123456", ... } ] } ```

inspection-process-template.description: InspectionProcessTemplate  Comprehensive template representing the entire inspection process. Implements all 5 phases from the inspection-system requirements:  1. Introduction Phase: Case Info → Company Data → Participants → Field Selection 2. Content Phase: Rule Checking with ad-hoc actions (add participant, collect document, pause, SOS) 3. Preparation Phase: Findings → Decisions 4. Record Phase: Document Generation → Merchant Review → Objections 5. Closing Phase: End Time → Signatures → Complete  This template composes all inspection-system atoms, molecules, and organisms to represent the full application workflow.

config.description: Workflow configuration from .orb schema Contains inlined tabs and phase configuration

inspection-wizard-template.description: InspectionWizardTemplate  Multi-step wizard template for conducting inspections. Guides inspectors through the inspection process.  Page: InspectionWizardPage Entity: Inspection ViewType: wizard

inspections-template.description: InspectionsTemplate  Template for the Inspections list page (/inspections). Displays Inspection entities with filtering and actions.  Page: InspectionsPage Entity: Inspection ViewType: list

inspectors-template.description: InspectorsTemplate  Template for the Inspectors list page (/inspectors). Displays Inspector entities (government inspectors).  Page: InspectorsPage Entity: Inspector ViewType: list

concept-detail-template.description: ConceptDetailTemplate - Template for displaying concept details with lesson and practice  Orbital Entity Binding: - Data flows through `entity` prop from Orbital state - User interactions emit events via useEventBus()  Events Emitted: - UI:START_LESSON - When starting the lesson - UI:START_PRACTICE - When starting practice/flashcards - UI:NAVIGATE_PREREQUISITE - When clicking a prerequisite - UI:NAVIGATE_PARENT - When clicking a parent concept - UI:BACK - When navigating back

knowledge-graph-template.description: KnowledgeGraphTemplate - Template for displaying a knowledge graph with layer navigation  Orbital Entity Binding: - Data flows through `entity` prop from Orbital state - User interactions emit events via useEventBus()  Events Emitted: - UI:SELECT_NODE - When a graph node is selected - UI:SELECT_LAYER - When a layer is selected - UI:TOGGLE_VIEW - When switching between graph and list view

lesson-template.description: LessonTemplate - Template for displaying lesson content with navigation  Orbital Entity Binding: - Data flows through `entity` prop from Orbital state - User interactions emit events via useEventBus()  Events Emitted: - UI:LESSON_COMPLETE - When lesson is marked complete - UI:LESSON_NEXT - When navigating to next lesson - UI:LESSON_PREV - When navigating to previous lesson - UI:TOGGLE_SIDEBAR - When sidebar is toggled

character-sprite.description: CharacterSprite Component  Renders isometric character sprites in "Illuminated Manuscript Futurism" style. Assets are loaded dynamically via TraitWarsAssetProvider - NOT bundled.

src.description: Fallback sprite URL (if not using AssetProvider)

team.description: Whether to apply team color tint

cost-display.description: CostDisplay Atom  Renders resource cost as icon + amount pairs. Extracted from HoMM3CastleTemplate for reuse across castle/building UI.

damage-popup.description: DamagePopup Component  Floating damage numbers that animate upward and fade out.

game-bar.description: GameBar Atom  Progress bar using themed bar image assets with ProgressBar fallback. Bar images are ~804x131px ornate bars that get clipped proportionally.

type.description: Bar type determines which asset and fallback color to use

guard-display.description: GuardDisplay Component  Visual indicator for defense/guard status during combat.

hero-avatar.description: HeroAvatar Component  Hero portrait with level badge - similar to Heroes of Might and Magic style. Displays hero portrait in ornate frame with level indicator.

heroId.description: Hero ID to display avatar for

hex-cell.description: HexCell Atom  Renders a single hexagon tile for the Trait Wars battlefield. Uses Box for layout and terrain sprites from Kenny asset pack.

isSelected.description: Whether this cell is currently selected

isHighlighted.description: Whether this cell is highlighted (e.g., hover)

isValidMove.description: Whether this is a valid move destination

isAttackTarget.description: Whether this cell is a valid attack target

size.description: Size of the hex in pixels

useSprites.description: Use sprite background (false = solid colors for fallback)

children.description: Children to render inside the hex (e.g., unit)

hex-tile-sprite.description: HexTileSprite Component  Renders isometric terrain tiles in "Illuminated Manuscript Futurism" style. Assets are loaded dynamically via TraitWarsAssetProvider - NOT bundled.

type.description: Type of terrain tile to display

src.description: Fallback sprite URL (if not using AssetProvider)

map-node.description: MapNode Component  Location marker on the world map representing cities, dungeons, resources, etc.

selected.description: Whether this node is currently selected

visited.description: Whether this node has been visited

pixel-character-sprite.description: PixelCharacterSprite Component  High-fidelity character sprites from the Pixel Platformer Pack. 24x24 sprites with 1px margin - larger and more visible than Roguelike 16x16. Assets are loaded dynamically via the TraitWarsAssetProvider.

team.description: Whether to apply team color tint

pixel-tile-sprite.description: PixelTileSprite Component  High-fidelity terrain tiles from the Pixel Platformer Pack. 18x18 tiles with 1px margin - larger and more visible than Roguelike 16x16. Assets are loaded dynamically via the TraitWarsAssetProvider.

state-indicator.description: StateIndicator Component  Displays a visual indicator for a trait's current state.

tile-sprite.description: TileSprite Component  Renders a tile from the Roguelike Dungeon Pack spritesheet. Assets are loaded dynamically via the TraitWarsAssetProvider.

trait-icon.description: TraitIcon Atom  Displays a trait ability icon with state indicators (ready, active, cooldown). Uses Box, Badge, and Icon components from the core design system.

traitId.description: Trait ID or category (combat, support, utility, passive, or archetype)

action-menu.description: ActionMenu Molecule  Contextual action menu for available unit actions. Uses Box, Button, and Icon components.

building-detail-panel.description: BuildingDetailPanel Molecule  Displays building details with icon, level, description, cost, and build/upgrade button. Extracted from HoMM3CastleTemplate for reuse in canvas-based castle templates.

building-slot.description: BuildingSlot Molecule  Displays a building sprite with level indicator for castle view. Uses Badge from @almadar/ui for level display.

fallbackIcon.description: Fallback icon (emoji) if no sprite available

game-unit.description: GameUnit Component  Compact game unit display using new roguelike sprites. Designed for in-grid or sidebar display.

isTargetable.description: Whether this unit can be targeted

garrison-unit-card.description: GarrisonUnitCard Molecule  Displays a garrison unit with portrait, tier badge, count, and optional transfer. Used in the castle garrison tab and hero army panels.

hero-detail-panel.description: HeroDetailPanel Molecule  Condensed sidebar-friendly hero profile panel. Sections render conditionally based on data availability — shows only what's provided.

hero.description: Hero data (WorldMapHero with optional profile fields)

level-up-modal.description: LevelUpModal Component  HoMM-style level-up modal presenting two skill choices. Hero gains stat bonuses and chooses one of two offered skills/traits.

resource-bar.description: ResourceBar Component  Displays player resources: Gold, Resonance, Trait Shards.

showExtended.description: Whether to show extended resources (wood, stone, crystal)

trait-slot.description: TraitSlot Component  Equippable trait slot with visual feedback for equipped/empty states. Shows TraitStateViewer tooltip on hover for equipped traits.

locked.description: Whether slot is locked (requires hero level)

unlockLevel.description: Required level to unlock this slot

onTraitDrop.description: Handler when trait is dropped on slot

onRemove.description: Handler to remove trait from slot

trait-state-viewer.description: TraitStateViewer Component  Displays a mini state machine visualization for a trait. Shows states as nodes, transitions as arrows, and highlights current state.

unit-card.description: UnitCard Molecule  Displays unit stats panel with health, traits, and attributes. Uses Card, Box, Typography, HealthBar, and TraitIcon components.

unit-recruit-card.description: UnitRecruitCard Molecule  Displays a recruitable unit with portrait, stats, cost, and recruit controls. Used in the castle recruitment panel.

unitType.description: Robot unit type for portrait lookup

disabled.description: Whether recruiting is disabled (e.g., can't afford)

building-grid.description: BuildingGrid Component  Castle building placement UI showing available buildings and their status.

onBuild.description: Handler when build button is clicked

combat-log.description: CombatLog Organism  Scrollable log of combat events with icons and colors. Uses Box, Typography, Badge, and Icon components.

game-board.description: GameBoard Component  The main game board with grid of tiles, unit selection, and movement.

game-board-with-traits.description: GameBoardWithTraits Component  Enhanced game board with trait visibility panel showing: - Selected unit's trait state machine - State changes during combat - Transition preview on hover

onCombatLog.description: Callback to add combat log entry

game-tile.description: GameTile Component  A game board tile that can contain a unit and display various states.

hex-game-board.description: HexGameBoard Organism  A complete hex grid game board using high-fidelity assets. Features: - Isometric hex grid layout - HexTileSprite for terrain - PixelCharacterSprite for units - Move/attack highlighting - Hover and selection states

tiles.description: Array of tiles defining the map

units.description: Array of units on the board

validMoves.description: Valid move positions for selected unit

attackTargets.description: Valid attack positions for selected unit

renderOverlay.description: Render custom overlays with access to tile positioning

hex-game-tile.description: HexGameTile Organism  A complete hex tile for the game board combining: - HexTileSprite for high-fidelity terrain - PixelCharacterSprite for units - Health bars and state indicators

renderMode.description: Render mode: 'visual' for sprites only, 'hitArea' for interaction only, 'both' for full tile

hex-grid.description: HexGrid Organism  Full battlefield grid with hexagonal tiles and unit placement. Uses Box, HexCell, and optional unit rendering.

units.description: Array of units on the grid

validMoves.description: Valid move destinations for selected unit

attackTargets.description: Valid attack targets for selected unit

isometric-game-canvas.description: IsometricGameCanvas Component  Canvas-based isometric game board for Trait Wars. Replaces DOM-based HexGameBoard with pixel-perfect canvas rendering.  Features: - Idle breathing animation (10.5.16) - Movement trail / ghost (10.5.17) - Pan & zoom camera (10.5.18) - Camera centering on selected unit (10.5.19) - Mini-map (10.5.20) - Smart redraw (10.5.21) - Off-screen tile culling (10.5.22)

units.description: Array of units on the board

getTerrainSprite.description: Asset loading function for terrain tiles

assetManifest.description: Asset manifest for automatic sprite resolution (used when getTerrainSprite/getFeatureSprite not provided)

backgroundImage.description: Background image URL tiled behind the isometric grid (moves with camera)

onDrawEffects.description: Callback to draw canvas effects after units (called inside draw, before ctx.restore)

hasActiveEffects.description: Whether there are active effects — keeps RAF animation loop alive

effectSpriteUrls.description: Additional sprite URLs to preload (e.g., effect sprites)

resolveUnitFrame.description: Optional callback to resolve animated sprite sheet frames for units. When provided, units with sprite sheets use frame-based animation instead of static sprites. Returns null for units without sheets.

unitScale.description: Extra scale multiplier for unit/hero draw size. 1 = default, 1.5 = 50% bigger.

trait-panel.description: TraitPanel Organism  Sidebar for managing unit traits - equip, upgrade, view details. Uses Box, Card, Typography, Button, and TraitIcon components.

unit-roster.description: UnitRoster Component  Grid of recruitable units for army composition. Displays unit cards with stats and selection state.

army-builder-template.description: ArmyBuilderTemplate Component  Full army composition screen with unit recruitment and squad assignment.

onAddUnit.description: Handler when unit is added to squad

onRemoveUnit.description: Handler when unit is removed from squad

battlefield-template.description: BattlefieldTemplate  Main game screen combining HexGrid, HUD, sidebar panels, and controls. Uses GameTemplate as base layout with trait-wars specific content.

canvas-battle-template.description: CanvasBattleTemplate  Tactical battle template using IsometricGameCanvas (canvas-based) with: - Asset-loaded isometric terrain and robot unit sprites - Phase-based turn system (observation → selection → movement → action → enemy_turn) - TraitStateViewer hover tooltip showing unit stats and state machines - CombatLog, DamagePopup, action buttons as DOM overlays

mapTheme.description: Map visual theme affecting floor and obstacle tiles

animationSpeed.description: Animation speed multiplier. 1 = baseline, 2 = double speed. Default: 2

canvas-castle-template.description: CanvasCastleTemplate  Canvas-based castle management using IsometricGameCanvas (canvas + DOM hybrid): - Isometric courtyard with buildings on tiles and garrison units in open spaces - DOM overlays: top bar, side panel (Buildings/Recruit/Garrison tabs), tooltip - Follows the same pattern as CanvasWorldMapTemplate and CanvasBattleTemplate

onTransferUnit.description: Handler when transferring units to/from garrison

onViewHeroProfile.description: Handler to view full hero profile

canvas-world-map-template.description: CanvasWorldMapTemplate  Strategic world map using IsometricGameCanvas (canvas-based) with: - Asset-loaded isometric terrain, hero sprites, and feature sprites - Resource nodes, castles, and portals rendered on canvas - Hero movement and encounters - DOM overlays: ResourceBar, hero info panel, hex tooltip

animationSpeed.description: Animation speed multiplier. 1 = baseline, 2 = double speed. Default: 2

unitScale.description: Unit/hero draw size multiplier. 1 = base, 2.5 = default. Default: 2.5

castle-template.description: CastleTemplate Component  Castle management screen: build structures, recruit units.

hero-profile-template.description: HeroProfileTemplate Component  Full hero profile with stats, equipped traits, and level progress. Main template for hero management screen.

hex-trait-wars-game.description: HexTraitWarsGame Template  A complete, fully-featured hex-based game template using high-fidelity assets: - HexGameBoard: Isometric hex grid with Hexagon Pack terrain tiles - PixelCharacterSprite: 24x24 Pixel Platformer character sprites - Trait visibility, combat system, and phase-based turns  This template demonstrates the integration of all Trait Wars components in a cohesive, interactive game experience.

ho-m-m3-castle-template.description: HoMM3 CastleTemplate  Castle management with visual castle backdrop showing: - Faction-themed castle with building slots - Clickable buildings that appear when constructed - Integrated army recruitment panel - Garrison management

onTransferUnit.description: Handler when transferring units to/from garrison

ho-m-m3-world-map.description: HoMM3 WorldMapTemplate  Strategic world map using HexGameBoard with: - Isometric hex terrain navigation - Resource nodes, castles, and portals - Hero movement and encounters - Turn-based gameplay

scenario-selector.description: Scenario Selector Component  UI for selecting and starting different game scenarios.

onSelectScenario.description: Called when a scenario is selected

trait-wars-game.description: TraitWarsGame Template  A complete, fully-featured game template that demonstrates ALL components from the Trait Wars design system working together:  - Trait Visibility: See opponent's state machines - Turn Phases: Observation → Planning → Execution → Tick - Counter-Play: Strategic positioning based on trait states - Combat Effects: Damage popups, guard display, animations - Full UI: Menu, game board, trait panel, combat log

world-map-template.description: WorldMapTemplate Component  Navigate between locations, encounter enemies on the strategic map.

onNodeSelect.description: Handler when a node is selected

onMove.description: Handler when player moves to a node

admin-dashboard-template.description: AdminDashboardTemplate  Template for the Admin Dashboard page (/admin). Displays system overview with stats, recent activity, and admin actions.  Page: AdminDashboardPage Entity: Multiple (User, Invite, Connection, etc.) ViewType: dashboard

assessment-template.description: AssessmentTemplate  Template for the Assessment page (/assessment). Displays psychological assessments for trust scoring.  Page: AssessmentPage Entity: Assessment ViewType: list

connections-template.description: ConnectionsTemplate  Template for the Connections page (/connections). Displays Connection entities with request/accept/reject actions.  Page: ConnectionsPage Entity: Connection ViewType: list

currentUserId.description: Current user ID (to determine incoming vs outgoing)

graph-intelligence-template.description: GraphIntelligenceTemplate  Template for the Graph Intelligence page (/graph-intelligence). Displays network analysis, clusters, and relationship insights.  Page: GraphIntelligencePage Entity: Cluster ViewType: dashboard

invites-template.description: InvitesTemplate  Template for the Invites page (/invites). Displays Invite entities with management actions.  Page: InvitesPage Entity: Invite ViewType: list

project-detail-template.description: ProjectDetailTemplate  Template for the Project Detail page (/projects/:id). Displays a single Project entity with full details and team info.  Page: ProjectDetailPage Entity: Project ViewType: detail

projects-template.description: ProjectsTemplate  Template for the Projects list page (/projects). Displays Project entities with team collaboration features.  Page: ProjectsPage Entity: Project ViewType: list

relationship-garden-template.description: RelationshipGardenTemplate  Template for the Relationship Garden page (/garden). Displays RelationshipHealth entities as a visual garden with plants.  This is the core visualization for the winning-11 app - the "digital garden" of trust relationships.  Page: RelationshipGardenPage Entity: RelationshipHealth ViewType: list

seed-network-template.description: SeedNetworkTemplate  Template for the Seed Network page (/seed-network). Displays seed nominations and network seeding management.  Page: SeedNetworkPage Entity: SeedNomination ViewType: list

suggestions-template.description: SuggestionsTemplate  Template for the Suggestions page (/suggestions). Displays AI-powered connection suggestions.  Page: SuggestionsPage Entity: ConnectionSuggestion ViewType: list

team-detail-template.description: TeamDetailTemplate  Template for the Team Detail page (/teams/:id). Displays a single Team entity with members and metrics.  Page: TeamDetailPage Entity: Team ViewType: detail

team-members-template.description: TeamMembersTemplate  Template for the Team Members page (/teams/:id/members). Displays and manages TeamMember entities for a specific team.  Page: TeamMembersPage Entity: TeamMember ViewType: list

teams-template.description: TeamsTemplate  Template for the Teams list page (/teams). Displays Team entities with collaboration features.  Page: TeamsPage Entity: Team ViewType: list

trust-intelligence-template.description: TrustIntelligenceTemplate  Template for the Trust Intelligence dashboard page (/trust-intelligence). Displays TrustScore metrics and analytics.  Page: TrustIntelligencePage Entity: TrustScore ViewType: dashboard

user-profile-template.description: UserProfileTemplate  Template for the User Profile detail page (/users/:id). Displays a single User entity with full details and actions.  Page: UserProfilePage Entity: User ViewType: detail

users-template.description: UsersTemplate  Template for the Users list page (/users). Displays User entities as a card grid with management actions.  Page: UsersPage Entity: User ViewType: list
